connect_success:
✅ **Connection Successful!**

Your wallet:
`{walletAddress}`
...has been added to your watchlist.
connect_fail_token:
❌ **Invalid link token.**

Please go back to [banmao.fun](https://banmao.fun) and press "Open bot" to try again.
welcome_generic:
Welcome to Xlayer BOT AI 🤖
– the dedicated assistant for OKX's Xlayer community!

✨ This BOT provides market information, Web3 guides, and Xlayer community support.

🎶 Faith & dreams will overcome greed & fear 🎶

🔗 **Official Links:**
   🔹 Xlayer X Account: https://x.com/XLayerOfficial
   🌐 OKX Web3: https://web3.okx.com/

🛠️ **Support:**
   ➡️ Use **/help** to view the full instruction panel (right below).

⚠️ **Safety Disclaimer:**
   This is a community AI assistant and not official financial advice from OKX. Always Do Your Own Research (DYOR).

✨ Developed by ＤＯＲＥＭＯＮ
   Developer X: https://x.com/haivcon
select_group_language: Admins: choose the language for this group's feed notifications:
group_language_changed_success: ✅ Group language updated. Future broadcasts will use this language.
language_changed_fail: Error: No wallet found linked to this chat. Please /register a wallet first.
register_success:
✅ **Watch Wallet Added!**

You will now receive notifications for:
`{walletAddress}`
register_invalid_address: ❌ Invalid wallet address. Please check and try again.
register_help_prompt:
👀 **Watch Wallets**: Use `/register <address>` or click `➕ Add Wallet` to check balances or track whales.

🔒 **Trading Wallets**: Securely encrypted wallets for manual trading via bot buttons, or for **Xbot AI to execute trades securely**.

💡 _Hint: AI-created wallets instantly appear in both sections, combining manual control and AI automation seamlessly!_
register_help_invalid: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid wallet address. Please try again.
register_help_error: ❌ Something went wrong while saving your wallet. Please try again.
register_help_success_wallet: ✅ Saved wallet {wallet}. Live token balances will refresh automatically.
register_help_success_wallet_named: ✅ Saved wallet {wallet} as {name}. Live token balances will refresh automatically.
mywallet_not_linked: ❌ You are not watching any wallets。 Use /register <wallet_address> to add a watch wallet and view all its tokens.
unregister_all_success: ✅ All wallets have been removed from your watchlist.
stats_no_wallet: ❌ You haven't linked a wallet. Use `/register` first.
stats_no_games: ❌ You haven't played any games yet.
group_language_admin_only: ❌ Only group admins can change the group language.
help_group_onboarding_desc: Open the welcome flow and rediscover the main commands.
help_group_xlayer_check_desc: Link wallets, see prices, supported chains, and rules in one streamlined place.
help_group_language_desc: Pick your interface language or configure the feed language for groups.
help_group_insights_desc: Clean chat traces, list supported chains, and explore ecosystem tools.
help_group_tools_desc: Quick utilities like randomizers, games, and donation shortcuts.
help_group_support_desc: Donate to the community wallet or burn OKB from circulation.
help_group_checkin_desc: Quick controls for group admins and owners to manage members.
help_command_stats: Check your Banmao RPS match history and statistics.
help_command_rand: Generate random numbers or scramble replied text.
help_command_random: Open the random toolkit with buttons.
help_command_roll: Roll virtual dice using NdM format.
help_command_td: Answer a quick truth-or-dare style quiz.
help_command_doremon: Draw a fortune card by topic number.
help_command_banmaoprice: Get the latest BANMAO price, route, and fee snapshot.
help_command_toptoken: Token ranking by price change, volume, or market cap.
help_command_lang: Set bot language for DMs, groups, or individual topics.
help_command_welcome_admin: Set verification for newcomers with timers and actions.
help_command_admin: Open the admin dashboard (full bot permissions required).
random_menu_description: Use buttons to explore random generators without spamming the chat.
random_share_ready: Your X share image is ready!
random_share_missing: Share link expired. Please try again from the latest result.
random_info_rand_title: Random numbers, text case remix, or option picker.
random_info_rand_usage: Remix text or pick random number/option: /rand [min max] or /rand A B C.
random_info_longshort_usage: Flip LONG/SHORT 1–100x: /rand long/short or the button.
random_info_mines_title: Mini Minesweeper with flags and replay.
random_info_memory_title: Memory board game with custom size.
random_gomoku_draw: Board is full. It's a draw.
random_gomoku_invalid_pick: Invalid cell. Pick one on the board.
random_gomoku_not_player: This match already has two players.
random_gomoku_expired: Gomoku session expired. Start a new one from /random.
random_gomoku_custom_hint: Type /gomoku 8x8-8x12 to set the board (8 columns, max 100 cells).
random_gomoku_size_capped: Board too large; using {size} to fit Telegram.
random_gomoku_win_toast: Line of five completed. Match finished.
random_chess_hint: Tap a piece, then a square to move.
random_chess_select_piece: Pick a white piece to move.
random_chess_not_player: Only the current player can move in this match.
random_chess_expired: Chess session expired. Start a new one from /random.
random_chess_waiting_opponent: Waiting for an opponent to join.
random_mines_instruction: Tap a cell to show nearby bombs. Toggle flag mode to mark suspected mines.
random_mines_finished_hint: Tap replay to start over or pick another size in /random.
random_mines_win: Field cleared in {moves} moves. Great job!
random_mines_size_prompt: Choose a Minesweeper board size (5x5 to 9x9).
random_mines_size_capped: Board too large; using {size} to stay under Telegram limits.
random_mines_expired: Minesweeper session expired. Start a new one from /random.
random_mines_invalid_pick: Invalid cell. Pick from the board.
random_mines_flagged_block: Cell flagged. Toggle flag mode to unflag first.
random_mines_finished: Game already finished. Start a new one.
random_treasure_help: Tap a cell to find the treasure. Radars give distance hints; traps make you lose a turn.
random_treasure_radar: 📡 Radar ping: treasure is {distance} steps away.
random_treasure_trap: 💥 Trap triggered! You lose the next turn.
random_treasure_skip: Trap effect: this turn is skipped.
random_treasure_win: 🎉 You found the treasure in {moves} moves!
random_treasure_not_player: This match already has two players.
random_treasure_expired: Treasure hunt expired. Start a new one from /random.
random_treasure_size_capped: Map too large; using {size} to fit Telegram.
random_memory_instruction: Pick any 2 tiles to flip and match pairs.
random_memory_already_completed: Game finished. Tap Memory to start a new round.
random_memory_size_prompt: Choose a Memory board size (up to 50x50). Large boards auto-cap to fit Telegram limits.
random_memory_size_capped: Board too large for Telegram, using {size} instead.
random_memory_expired: Session expired. Start a new Memory game from /random.
random_memory_invalid_pick: Invalid tile. Pick a tile from the board.
random_memory_custom_hint: Type /memory <width> <height> (example: /memory 6 8 or /memory 8x8). Max 50x50, auto-capped for Telegram.
random_memory_size_prompt_with_theme: Choose a board size for {theme}. Large boards auto-cap to fit Telegram.
random_sudoku_instruction: Select a cell on the grid, then pick a number below. Locked cells cannot be edited.
random_sudoku_locked_cell: This cell is locked and cannot be changed.
random_sudoku_invalid_pick: Invalid cell. Tap a cell on the board.
random_sudoku_invalid_number: Pick a number that fits the board.
random_sudoku_no_selection: Choose a cell first, then select a number.
random_sudoku_need_fix: Board is full but not correct yet. Recheck the mismatched cells.
random_sudoku_completed: 🎉 Solved in {moves} moves with {mistakes} retries in {duration}.
random_sudoku_expired: Sudoku session expired. Start a new round from /random.
random_sudoku_already_completed: Sudoku finished. Start a new game from /random.
random_sudoku_size_prompt: Pick a Sudoku size (4x4 quick, 6x6 speedy, 9x9 classic).
random_sudoku_custom_hint: Type /sudoku 4 or /sudoku 6 for quick games, /sudoku 9 for classic mode.
random_textcase_hint: Reply to a message with /rand to shuffle its letters!
random_rand_usage: How to use: • /rand 1 100 → number range • /rand pizza sushi burger → choose an option • Reply /rand to a message → shuffle text case • /rand long/short → LONG/SHORT with random x
random_rps_usage: Use /rps rock|paper|scissors or pick a button in the menu.
random_rps_hint: Tip: type /rps rock|paper|scissors or tap the buttons in the /random toolkit.
random_truth_hint: Pick an answer below to lock in your guess.
random_truth_incorrect: 😈 Wrong answer. The bot mocks you from afar.
random_fortune_title: ( ＤＯＲＥＭＯＮ used the time machine to help you glimpse destiny )
random_fortune_topics_cta: Tap a theme below to draw instantly.
random_fortune_choose: Choose a fortune topic to draw a card.
random_fortune_invalid: Invalid topic. Please pick a number from the buttons.
random_fortune_limit_reached: ⚠️ You've reached today's fortune draw limit (max {{limit}} per user).
random_fortune_drawn_topic: You drew {{topic}} — here is your fortune:
admin_menu_hint: Run /admin in your group, then tap the commands below to read and use them quickly.
admin_menu_intro: 🛡️ Admin control panel: parent /admin and child commands with icons, usage, and extensions.
admin_dm_prompt: Pick a group you manage, then run /admin there to use these tools.
admin_dm_no_groups: No managed groups tracked yet. Run /admin in your group once to remember it, then pick it here.
admin_help_lock_links_usage_guard: Enable /lock links and pick an action via /setlinkaction <warn|mute|kick|ban|delete>.
admin_help_lock_links_usage_allow: Whitelist safe URLs with /link <url> and reopen with /unlock links.
admin_help_lock_files_usage_types: Lock photos, videos, stickers, or documents individually with /lock <type>.
admin_help_lock_files_usage_guard: Lock all file types at once with /lock files when you need a hard lockdown.
admin_help_lock_files_usage_allow: Reopen file sharing with /unlock files after the lockdown.
admin_help_lock_files_usage_unlock: Restore every media type at once using /unlock files.
admin_help_antiflood_usage_config: Set limits with /setflood <messages>/<seconds> and action via /setfloodaction <mute|kick|ban|delete>.
admin_help_antiflood_usage_toggle: Toggle protection with /flood on or /flood off.
admin_broadcast_prompt_group: 📢 Reply with the message to broadcast to the whole group.
admin_broadcast_prompt_direct: 📩 Reply with: USER_ID your message to deliver it directly.
admin_broadcast_format_error: Please send a user ID followed by the message text.
admin_broadcast_sent_direct: Sent the message to the chosen ID.
admin_broadcast_sent_group: Sent the message to the group.
help_command_admin_id: ID lookup via reply, @username, or in-chat.
help_command_admin_ban: Ban by ID/username or reply; unban with /unban or /unbanall.
help_command_admin_kick: Kick a member so they can rejoin later.
help_command_admin_mute: Mute a member for a set duration; mute all with /muteall.
help_command_admin_unmute: Unmute a member immediately and clear timers.
help_command_admin_muteall: Pause all member messages except admins.
help_command_admin_unmuteall: Restore chat for everyone after mute-all.
help_command_admin_warn: Warn with /warn <reason> and enforce configured limits.
help_command_admin_warnings: Review warnings via /warnings as reply/@username or alone for all.
help_command_admin_welcome: Set welcome text with placeholders; auto-delete if desired.
help_command_admin_delete: Delete one with /del or bulk with /dela <count> from a reply anchor.
help_command_admin_lock_links: Block links (/lock links), allowlist with /link, unlock with /unlock links.
help_command_admin_lock_files: Lock photos/videos/stickers/docs via /lock; undo with /unlock files.
help_command_admin_antiflood: Configure flood limits and actions; toggle /flood on/off.
help_command_admin_rules: Save group rules and link them in welcomes or warnings.
help_command_admin_info: Reply /info to view user details and warning counts.
help_command_admin_filter: Create keyword auto replies with /filter <name>; review via /filters and remove with /filterx.
help_command_admin_filters: View all saved /filter keywords and replies.
admin_filter_prompt: Send the reply content for filter "{keyword}". Use /filters to review keywords (tap a keyword there to delete) or /filterx <name> to remove one manually.
admin_filters_remove_hint: Tap a /filters <keyword> button below to delete that filter immediately.
admin_help_id_usage_reply: Reply or mention @username to fetch their Telegram ID.
admin_help_id_usage_chat: Send /id in a group to retrieve the chat ID instantly.
admin_help_info_usage_reply: Reply with /info to view name, ID, username, and moderation shortcuts.
admin_help_info_usage_buttons: Use the inline buttons to ban, kick, mute, warn, unmute, or delete right away.
admin_help_ban_usage_target: Reply, mention, or pass an ID/username to ban and clear their messages.
admin_help_kick_usage_target: Reply or target a user to remove them while allowing immediate rejoin.
admin_help_kick_usage_rejoin: Great for quick cleanup without a permanent ban.
admin_help_mute_usage_duration: Reply or target a user with optional duration like /mute @user 1h.
admin_help_mute_usage_override: Each new /mute clears the previous timer so the latest duration wins.
admin_help_unmute_usage_target: Reply or pass an ID/username to restore send permissions instantly.
admin_help_unmute_usage_reset: Also clears any scheduled unmute from earlier actions.
admin_help_muteall_usage_enable: Use /muteall to halt all non-admin chatting during incidents.
admin_help_unmuteall_usage_restore: Use /unmuteall to reopen messaging for everyone when things are stable.
admin_help_warn_usage_reason: Reply with /warn <reason> to log and announce the infraction.
admin_help_warn_usage_limit: Set thresholds via /setwarnlimit <n> <ban|kick|mute> and review with /warnings.
admin_help_warnings_usage_review: Use /warnings @user or reply with /warnings to list their warnings; use /warnings alone to list everyone.
admin_help_welcome_usage_cleanup: Bot can auto-delete welcome messages after the delay you choose.
admin_help_delete_usage_single: Reply /del to remove a specific message.
admin_help_delete_usage_bulk: Reply then run /dela or /dela <count> to clear recent batches quickly.
admin_help_rules_usage_share: Link the rules in welcomes or warns so members can tap /rules to reread them.
admin_help_filter_usage_setup: Create a trigger with /filter <name> then send the response (text, media, or buttons).
admin_help_filter_usage_trigger: Members trigger the saved reply by typing the keyword. Use /filters to review and tap a keyword to delete, or /filterx <name> to remove it manually.
admin_help_filters_usage_list: Use /filters to see all keywords and their replies when auditing your setup.
admin_help_filters_usage_copy: Each /filters <keyword> button deletes that filter instantly so you can clean up fast.

txhash_error: ⚠️ Unable to load transaction details right now.
token_usage: Tap /token, pick a chain, then paste the contract address to explore the token.
token_chain_prompt: Select an OKX-supported chain, then paste the token contract to inspect.
token_chain_missing: ⚠️ Chain directory is unavailable right now.
token_address_prompt: Paste the token contract to inspect on {chain}.
token_address_prefill: Detected address: {address} — send or replace it.
token_help_invalid: ⚠️ Please paste a valid token contract first.
token_error: ⚠️ Unable to load token details right now.
contract_invalid: ⚠️ Please provide a valid contract address on Xlayer.
contract_help_prompt: Send the contract address you want to check on Xlayer.
idtelegram_prompt: Send any text/photo/video/sticker/document and I'll return its Telegram details (file_id, file_unique_id, etc.). You can also reply to an existing message with /dataTelegram to fetch it instantly.
idtelegram_result_header: Here are the Telegram details for this {type}:
toptoken_chain_prompt: Select a chain to view the Token Ranking List.
toptoken_error: ❌ Unable to load the token ranking right now. Please try again later.
toptoken_no_data: No token data available for the selected filters.
contract_usage: Use /contract to paste a contract address and get an OKLink lookup link.
ai_usage:
🤖 *Xlayer BOT Ai Assistant*

━━━ 💡 How to use /ai ━━━
📝 Text: `/ai your question`
🖼️ With image: Send image + caption `/ai what is this?`
🎤 Voice: Send audio to chat

━━━ 🎨 AI Image Generation ━━━
Keywords: `draw, image, imagine, generate`
Example: `/ai draw a sleeping cat`
ai_usage_with_api:
🤖 *Xlayer BOT Ai Assistant*

━━━ 💡 How to use ━━━
📝 Text: `/ai your question`
🖼️ With image: Send image + caption `/ai what is this?`
🎤 Voice: Send audio to chat

━━━ 🎨 AI Image Generation ━━━
Keywords: `draw, image, imagine, generate`
Example: `/ai draw a sleeping cat`

━━━ 🤖 Agent Mode (/aib) ━━━
Lets the bot think and call commands automatically
Currently supports Google AI only
ai_missing_api_key: AI is not configured. Please set Xlayer_API_KEY.
ai_error: Sorry, something went wrong while contacting Xlayer B-Ai. Please try again.
ai_switch_to_user_keys: You've reached the free /ai limit of {limit}. Switching to your Google API key.
ai_using_personal_key: Using your personal Google API key.
ai_image_too_large: ⚠️ That photo is too large to process (max {limitMb} MB). Please send a smaller image.
ai_image_download_timeout: ⚠️ Downloading the image took too long. Try again with a smaller image or later.
ai_quota_exhausted: Xlayer B-Ai usage quota is currently limited. Please try again in a moment.
ai_session_expired: The Xlayer B-Ai chat has expired. Start a new one with /ai.
txhash_insight_no_wallet: 👤 No focus wallet detected — showing raw flows.
checkin_prompt_text: 🌞 A fresh new day! Banmao team, let's check in! Tap "Check in" or use /checkin to confirm you're present and ready!
checkin_dm_intro: 🌞 Hi! Answer this quick question to complete your check-in.
checkin_dm_choose_option: Pick the correct answer using the buttons below:
checkin_error_locked: ❌ You've used all attempts today. Please contact an admin for help.
checkin_error_already_checked: ✅ You're already checked in for today. See you tomorrow!
checkin_error_dm_failed: ⚠️ I couldn't send the question. Please open a private chat with the bot and try again.
checkin_dm_failure_start: {user}, I couldn't DM you. Tap the button below to open the bot, press Start, then try again.
checkin_dm_failure_start_alert: Please open the bot, tap Start, then try again.
checkin_error_record_failed: ⚠️ Something went wrong while recording your check-in. Please try again later or contact an admin.
checkin_alert_attempts_locked: ❌ Incorrect! You've run out of attempts for today.
checkin_dm_locked: ❌ You answered incorrectly three times. Please contact an admin to restore your check-in access.
checkin_error_question_expired: ⏳ That question expired. Please start again from the group.
checkin_error_save_emotion: Couldn't save your emotion. Please try again later.
checkin_dm_goal_prompt: 🎯 Set your goal for today by choosing an option or sending your own text.
checkin_error_goal_invalid: ⚠️ Please enter a valid goal (it can't be empty).
checkin_alert_goal_saved: 🔥 Goal saved! Have a productive day!
checkin_dm_goal_success: 🔥 Goal saved! Have a productive day!
checkin_dm_goal_skip: ✅ Check-in complete! Have a wonderful day!
checkin_goal_custom_prompt: Please enter your goal in the next message.
checkin_goal_custom_dm: ✍️ Type your goal and send it here.
checkin_error_goal_save: ⚠️ Couldn't save your goal. Please try again later.
checkin_error_goal_stage: Please complete the emotion step first.
checkin_success_wallet_missing: ⚠️ You haven't linked an Xlayer wallet yet. Use /register to add one!
checkin_emotion_prompt: How are you feeling today? Choose an emoji!
checkin_leaderboard_empty: No check-in data to display yet.
checkin_admin_menu_user_section: 👥 *Member shortcuts* — share these helpers with your community.
checkin_admin_menu_admin_section: 🛠️ *Admin tools* — manage streaks, reminders, and access.
checkin_admin_section_lists_hint: View today's check-ins, summary, revoke or restore access.
checkin_admin_section_announcements_hint: Send reminders, summary, or private messages.
checkin_admin_section_leaderboard_hint: View standings, manage members, or reset the period.
checkin_topics_hint: Use {{addCmd}} in a topic to subscribe it to check-in announcements; use {{removeCmd}} in a topic to remove.
checkin_topic_not_found: Topic was not subscribed for check-in.
checkin_admin_menu_board_hint: Select a button below to continue.
checkin_admin_today_empty: 📋 No one has checked in today yet.
checkin_summary_broadcast_footer: Keep checking in daily to stay on the board!
checkin_admin_summary_window_empty: No check-ins were recorded during this summary window.
checkin_admin_summary_broadcast_empty: ⚠️ No recent check-ins to summarize yet.
checkin_admin_toggle_on_alert: Enabled check-in announcements for this group.
checkin_admin_toggle_off_alert: Disabled check-in announcements for this group.
checkin_admin_remove_prompt: Select a member to revoke today's check-in:
checkin_admin_remove_missing: ⚠️ Couldn't find a check-in record to remove.
checkin_admin_unlock_empty: No members are locked out today.
checkin_admin_unlock_prompt: Select a member to restore check-in access:
checkin_admin_dm_empty: No one has checked in yet to receive a secret message.
checkin_admin_dm_prompt: Choose a member to receive a secret message:
checkin_admin_dm_all_limit_note: (Only the first {count} members will be included in the group blast.)
checkin_admin_dm_all_prompt: ✍️ Enter the message you want to send privately to {count} members.
checkin_admin_dm_all_result: 📣 Secret message sent to {success} member(s). Failed deliveries: {failed}.
checkin_admin_dm_enter_prompt_alert: 💬 Send the secret message to the bot.
checkin_admin_dm_enter_message: ✍️ Enter the message you want to send to {user}.
checkin_admin_user_prompt_text:
🌞 Daily check-in reminder:
• Tap the group's "Check in" button or use /checkin to start today's challenge.
• Have your Xlayer wallet ready so your attendance earns the configured points.
• Answer the math check to prove you're human!
checkin_admin_user_leaderboard_text: 🏆 Want to see the standings? Tap the "Leaderboard" button or run /topcheckin [streak|total|points|longest] to view the latest rankings.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_manage_hint: Select a member to review their stats or remove them from this period.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_manage_empty: No members have checked in during this leaderboard period yet.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_member_history: No check-ins found for this leaderboard period.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_remove_done: Removed ID {id} from the leaderboard period starting {start}.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_reset_hint: This only affects the leaderboard for this group. Timezone: {timezone}.
checkin_admin_leaderboard_reset_done: Leaderboard period restarted. New start date: {start}.
checkin_dm_secret_error: ⚠️ Couldn't deliver the message. The recipient may not have opened a chat with the bot.
checkin_admin_points_prompt: ✍️ Enter the new daily check-in points:
checkin_admin_title_invalid: ⚠️ Please send a headline instead of leaving it blank.
checkin_admin_summary_prompt_alert: Enter the desired number of days.
checkin_admin_summary_prompt: ✍️ Enter the number of days for the summary window:
checkin_admin_weights_current: Current mix: {math} math • {physics} physics • {chemistry} chemistry • {okx} OKX • {crypto} crypto
checkin_admin_weights_hint: Pick a preset below or send custom values like "math=40 physics=20 chemistry=20 okx=10 crypto=10".
checkin_admin_weights_choose_prompt: Select a preset or send custom weights.
checkin_admin_weights_prompt: ✍️ Send the math, physics, chemistry, OKX, and crypto weights (e.g., "40 20 20 10 10").
checkin_admin_weights_invalid: ⚠️ Please provide five non-negative numbers (at least one above zero).
checkin_admin_schedule_none: No automatic reminders are scheduled yet.
checkin_admin_schedule_hint: Use a preset below or enter custom HH:MM times separated by commas.
checkin_admin_schedule_invalid: ⚠️ Please provide 1–6 valid times in HH:MM format.
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_hint: Timezone: {timezone}. Copy or link to the auto reminder schedule, or enter custom times.
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_auto_note: Currently following the auto schedule ({count} slot(s)).
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_prompt_al: Reply with the summary reminder times.
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_invalid: ⚠️ Please provide 1–6 valid times in HH:MM format.
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_reset_suc: ✅ Summary reminders copied from the auto schedule ({count} slot(s)): {times}.
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_sync_aler: 🔁 Linking summaries to the auto schedule...
checkin_admin_summary_schedule_sync_succ: ✅ Summary reminders will now follow the auto schedule ({count} slot(s)): {times}.
checkin_admin_summary_reset_hint: This clears the running summary for the last {days} day(s) (currently {start} → {end}). New check-ins after today will rebuild the report. Timezone: {timezone}.
checkin_admin_summary_reset_success: ✅ Summary totals reset. The next report will start from {start}.

checkin_admin_error_no_permission_action: You don't have permission to use this feature.

ai_limit_reached: You've reached today's /ai limit of {limit} requests.
ai_api_menu_hint: Add personal Google API keys to keep /ai running smoothly after the free server quota.
ai_api_add_hint: Tip: use `Name | KEY` per line. Get new keys at aistudio.google.com/api-keys.
ai_api_empty: No personal API keys added yet.
ai_provider_quota: ⚠️ API Quota Exceeded! 🔄 Please try a different AI Model for Google AI API 🔑 Manage your API keys with /api
ai_provider_billing_limit: ⚠️ {provider} hit the billing hard limit. Please check billing or add another key in /api.
ai_provider_gemini_key_expired: ⚠️ Your Gemini API key expired. Add a fresh key in /api to keep using it.
ai_error_flash_live_no_content: ⚠️ Gemini 2.5 Flash Live cannot generate content. 🎙️ This model is for function calling and Live API only. 🔄 Please switch to a different model in /api.
ai_live_audio_error: ⚠️ Voice processing failed with Flash Live model. Please try again or switch to a different model in /api.
ai_error_model_overloaded: ⚠️ AI Model Overloaded! 🔄 The model is currently busy. Please: • Switch to a different AI model • Or add a new API key in /api
ai_api_parse_error: Couldn't read those API keys. Please send one key per line or use `Name | KEY`.
ai_api_save_result: Saved {added} new key(s), updated {updated}. Received {total} line(s).
ai_api_add_prompt: Send your Google API key(s). Each line can be `Name | KEY` or just the key. Your keys stay private and are only used for your /ai requests.
ai_api_add_prompt_groq: Send your Groq API key(s). Each line can be `Name | KEY` or just the key. Keys stay private and only power your /ai requests.
ai_api_add_prompt_openai: Send your ChatGPT (OpenAI) API key(s). Each line can be `Name | KEY` or just the key. Keys stay private and only power your /ai requests.
ai_api_menu_hint_groq: Add Groq keys to run /ai with Groq models and rotate keys to dodge rate limits.
ai_api_add_hint_groq: Send one key per line. You can prefix with a label, e.g., `Groq Main | gsk_...`.
ai_api_menu_hint_openai: Add ChatGPT keys to run /ai with OpenAI models. Server and personal keys rotate automatically to reduce rate limits.
ai_api_add_hint_openai: Send one ChatGPT key per line. Labels like `Work | sk-...` are supported for clarity.
ai_api_usecases_google: 🧩 Purpose: Multimodal chat (text + images) with Gemini. 🎯 Best for: fast answers, vision, and balanced quality. 🔗 Get key: {url} ⚙️ Tip: add multiple keys to rotate and switch to Google in /ai when needed.
ai_api_audio_google: 🎤 Audio & voice: Gemini speech-to-text plus Gemini TTS for spoken replies. 🛠️ How to use: run /ai tts with text or an audio reply to get a voiced file that follows your saved voice & language. 🎚️ Settings: open Google Ai in /api then tap "TTS settings" to pick voices and languages with flags. 📌 Works with: personal Google keys saved in the /api hub.
ai_api_usecases_groq:
⚡ Purpose: Ultra-fast text chat with Groq models and key rotation.
🎯 Best for: low-latency replies, coding, and long sessions.
🔗 Get key: {url}
⚙️ Tip: add several keys (comma/line) to round-robin and pick Groq inside /ai.
ai_api_usecases_openai:
💬 Purpose: ChatGPT models with strong reasoning.
🎯 Best for: rich answers, reasoning, and creativity.
🔗 Get key: {url}
⚙️ Tip: save multiple keys to rotate; select ChatGPT inside /ai or /api hub.
ai_api_audio_openai:
🎤 Audio & voice: Whisper for speech-to-text; TTS-1/TTS-1-HD for spoken replies.
🛠️ How to use: send a Telegram voice note → bot transcribes with OpenAI → ChatGPT replies → optionally sends a voice clip back.
📌 Works whenever ChatGPT keys are active in /ai or the /api hub.
ai_api_image_notes_google: 🖼️ 🇺🇸 Google image prompts (English): • Create: "create image", "generate image", "draw", "paint", "make image", "imagine". • Edit (attach a photo): "edit image", "edit photo", "remove background". • Variation (attach a photo): "variation", "new version", "another version". 💡 Use /ai with Google selected; attach a photo for edit/variation or send text-only to create.
ai_api_image_notes_openai:
🖼️ 🇺🇸 ChatGPT image prompts (English):
• Create: "create image", "generate image", "draw", "paint", "make image", "imagine".
• Edit (attach a photo): "edit image", "edit photo", "remove background".
• Variation (attach a photo): "variation", "new version", "another version".
💡 Trigger image creation or editing via /ai while using ChatGPT; include a photo for edits/variations.
ai_audio_provider_supported: Voice input works with Google/Gemini or ChatGPT/OpenAI keys. Switch to Google or ChatGPT, or send text instead.
ai_audio_google_transcript_prompt: Transcribe this audio message in the original language.
ai_audio_google_conversation_prompt: Summarize the audio and reply in the same language with a concise answer.
ai_tts_usage: Configure Gemini TTS for your replies. /ai tts ‹text› or a reply will use the saved voice & language—no extra panels shown during the request. Open TTS settings in the Google Ai API hub to adjust.
ai_tts_missing_text: ⚠️ I need text or audio to turn into speech. Try /ai tts <text> or reply to a message.
ai_api_copy_hint: Tap 📋 Copy to view and copy your saved key.
ai_api_copy_notice: Keep this key private and avoid sharing it publicly.
ai_api_copy_missing: Couldn't find that key. Please refresh.
ai_api_add_dm: Reply in DM to add your API key.

✅ Full features: Chat, Image, TTS, Thinking
✅ Most capable, best quality

aib_gaming_gomoku_created: ⭕ Gomoku game created! Use /gomoku to play against AI.
aib_gaming_chess_created: ♟️ Chess game created! Use /chess to play on an 8x8 board.
aib_gaming_error_general: ⚠️ Unable to create game. Please try again.
aib_usage:
💡 Usage: /aib <natural language request>
Example: /aib roll 2 6-sided dice
/aib play rock paper scissors with scissors
/aib give me a random number from 1 to 100
aib_personal_key_required:
🔑 To use /aib, you need to add your personal Google API key in /api.
This command uses Gemini Function Calling, so the shared bot key cannot be used.
aib_api_error: ⚠️ An error occurred while calling AI. Please try again later.
aib_quota_exceeded: ⚠️ You have exceeded your API key quota. Check /api or add a new key.
aib_key_expired: ⚠️ Your API key has expired. Please add a new key in /api.
aib_bot_introduction: I'm Xlayer Bot AI, a virtual assistant helping OKX's Xlayer community. Developed by DOREMON (x.com/haivcon)
ai_aib_usage:
⚡ `/aib [your request]`

Use AI to control bot functions through natural language.
Example: `/aib count members in this group`
ai_aib_requires_key:
🔑 Function calling requires a personal Google API key.

Please add your key first using the /api command, then try /aib again.
ai_persona_hint: Pick a persona to change how the AI chats with you.
ai_persona_custom_prompt: Send your custom persona description (tone, style, do/don't). First line = name (optional).
ai_persona_custom_invalid: Please send some text for your persona.
challenges_tip: Complete challenges to earn bonus points!
error_admin_only: ❌ Only admins can use this command
ai_usage_tip: Add an API key via /api to chat without limits!
ai_usage_legend: Note: Statistics are reset daily at 00:00 UTC. Add API keys in /api for unlimited usage.
ai_api_image_keywords_hint: Use these keywords at the start of your message to generate images.
ai_api_edit_keywords_hint: Reply to an image with these keywords to edit it.
ai_aib_intro_note: /aib lets the bot think and call functions to automate tasks. Use it when you want the bot to act, not just chat.
ai_google_priority_note: Add your personal Google AI API key to unlock full reasoning power and avoid rate limits.
command_unknown_suggestion: ❓ Command `{input}` doesn't exist. Did you mean: {suggestions}?

command_private_only: ⚠️ This command only works in private chats.
command_no_permission: 🔒 You don't have permission to use this command.
command_rate_limited: ⏳ You're sending commands too quickly. Please wait {time}.
command_cooldown: ⏳ Please wait {time} before using this command again.
command_execution_error: ❌ An error occurred while running the command.
owner_action_cmdstats_desc: View usage stats for modular commands
profile_prompt: 🙋 /profile Command 📝 Purpose: Save your personal info so AI can give personalized replies. 📋 How to use: 1️⃣ Tap here to copy the template: /profile Name | Age | Gender | Birthdate | Nationality 2️⃣ Edit each column separated by | 3️⃣ Send the edited command 👤 Gender: male, female, or other 💡 Example: /profile Alice | 25 | female | 1999-05-20 | Vietnam 🗑️ Clear profile: /profile clear
profile_invalid: ❌ Could not parse profile. 💡 Use format: Name | Age | Gender | Birthdate | Nationality Separate columns with |
help_command_profile: Save your profile so AI knows you better
profile_reminder: Add your personal info so I can personalize replies. Tap below to fill it in.
confirm_hint: Choose an option or press Cancel
ai_model_flash_live_desc: 🎙️ Voice chat AI - Talk directly with the bot using audio
ai_model_live_detail:
🎙️ Voice-to-Voice AI Conversation
✅ Talk with bot using voice messages
✅ High rate limits - recommended for heavy use
✅ Call commands with keywords
ai_model_live_who:
👤 For: Everyone who prefers voice chat
⭐ Recommended: High limits, natural conversations
ai_key_auto_switched: ⚠️ API Key Notice Some of your API keys failed. Bot automatically switched to a working key.
ai_key_manage_hint: 💡 Delete invalid keys in /api to avoid future issues.

price_media_bulk_empty: ⚠️ No media received! Send photos or videos.

ai_swap_no_pool: No DEX liquidity pool found for this pair. You can try on OKX DEX:
ai_import_wallet_hint: 🔐 Send your Private Key in a private message (DM) to the bot for security. 💡 Pro Tip: You can import multiple wallets at once by pasting multiple Private Keys separated by spaces or newlines. Or use the command: /importkey [KEY1] [KEY2]...

ai_no_trading_wallet: ⚠️ No trading wallet linked. Use /importkey in DM to import.
tw_created_hint: Send tokens to this wallet to start trading.
tw_backup_warning: ⚠️ Backup now! Use /exportkey in DM to save your private key.
tw_already_exists: You already have a trading wallet.
tw_confirm_delete: Are you sure? This will remove your trading key.
tw_key_encrypted: 🔒 Private key is encrypted and stored securely.
tw_swap_hint: 💡 AI command: swap [amount] [from_token] to [to_token] Example: swap 1000 banmao to okb
tw_batch_swap_hint: 💡 Command: batch swap [amount] [from_token] to [to_token] Swap simultaneously on ALL trading wallets.
tw_batch_import_hint: 📥 You can paste multiple private keys separated by spaces or newlines in a private message. Or use command: /importkey KEY_1 KEY_2 KEY_3

ai_auto_import_deleted_warning: ⚠️ Your message containing Private Key(s) will be automatically deleted in {seconds} seconds for security.
tw_export_all_dm: 🔑 All your wallet keys (keep them safe!):
tw_delete_all_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to DELETE ALL trading wallets?
wh_tip: Tip: Chat directly with AI to manage wallets (e.g. "create new wallet", "export key")
ai_wallet_empty: 📭 Wallet {address} is empty or not found on X Layer.
ai_top_warning:
⚠️ **Important Note:**
Tokens with massive growth are often memecoins with very low market cap and liquidity, carrying extreme risk.
**DO NOT** trade without careful research.
* Before investing, ask me to "check security for token [contract address]" to avoid honeypots or non-sellable tokens.

Would you like me to check the security of any token on this list?
ai_chart_risk_microcap:
⚠️ **Risk Warning:**
For micro-cap tokens, technical analysis is often less accurate due to low liquidity. Price swings can occur unexpectedly regardless of indicators.
> _Recommendation:_ Ask me to "check security for token {address}" to mitigate risks.
ai_chart_header: Below is a detailed technical analysis based on **{bar}** chart data over the last **{count}** periods:
ai_chart_rsi_detail: RSI Detail: This indicator shows that buyers and sellers are currently in a {state} state.
ai_chart_rsi_overbought_state: heavily favoring buyers, risk of downward correction
ai_chart_rsi_oversold_state: heavily favoring sellers, high-risk bottom-fishing opportunity
ai_sec_error: ❌ Could not retrieve security data from GoPlus API. This token might not be indexed or the network is not supported.
ai_sec_no_risks: ❌ No risks reported, but no detailed data found for this contract. Please Do Your Own Research (DYOR).
ai_sec_honey_detected: 🚨 **HONEYPOT DETECTED:** You cannot sell this token!
ai_sec_closed_source: ⚠️ Contract is unverified (Closed Source). Malicious code could be hidden.
ai_sec_proxy: ⚠️ Contract is a Proxy, the owner can change the logic at any time.
ai_sec_mintable: ⚠️ Contract owner can mint unlimited tokens, diluting value.
ai_sec_take_back: ⚠️ Contract owner can take back ownership.
ai_sec_safe_temp: ✅ No critical malicious risks detected temporarily.
ai_sec_disclaimer: _Note: This report uses automated AI to scan the source code and is not investment advice. A safe contract can still crash in price (Liquidity Rug Pull)._
ai_holder_no_data: 📭 Holder list data is currently not fully indexed on the on-chain system. Please check directly on the blockchain explorer.
ai_holder_warning: ⚠️ *Note: If the top wallets are Smart Contracts, they may be Liquidity Pools or Burn wallets. If regular user wallets hold a massive percentage, be highly cautious of whale dumping risks.*
